title: Black & Silver Glitz Happy Birthday Script Prismatic Foil Jointed Banner (83cm) - Perfect Party Decor for Birthday Celebrations - 2 Pc
features: GLITZ DESIGN: Our glitz script happy birthday prismatic foil jointed banner features a stunning black & silver glitter design that brings a touch of glamour and sparkle to any birthday celebration, making it the ultimate party decor choice for all ages.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL: Crafted from durable prismatic foil, this 83cm long banner ensures longevity and retains its vibrant colors, allowing you to reuse it for multiple celebrations and receive compliments from your guests every time.

PERFECT PARTY DECOR: Transform your party space into a dazzling wonderland with this 2-piece banner set, ideal for adding a touch of glamour and shine to any birthday celebration, irrespective of age or gender.
EFFORTLESS SETUP: Easy to use and assemble, our jointed banner can be hung effortlessly, saving you time and allowing you to focus on enjoying the special day with your loved ones.

BOOST YOUR PARTY AMBIANCE: Maximize your birthday celebration's visual appeal with this stunning black & silver glitz script happy birthday prismatic foil jointed banner, ensuring your event is the talk of the town and a trendsetter on social media.
